title: ageratina hidalgensis
intro: Ageratina hidalgensis, also known as Hidalgo's mountain silver, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ageratina hidalgensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ageratina hidalgensis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
